ambiguities.source_text: Categorise Product Types as Fruit or Non-Fruit

ambiguities.intent: Define which specific scents are classified as Fruit (all others are Non-Fruit).
Specify how to interpret the Return field as a boolean and what to do with missing/unrecognized values.

ambiguities.source_text: Form a Date using the file number as a month

ambiguities.intent: Choose the Type label used for the single overall (full dataset) summary row.
Order final rows as product types Bar, Massage Bar, Bath Bomb, Liquid; then All, Non-Fruit, Fruit; then months 2019-05-01, 2019-04-01, 2019-03-01, 2019-02-01, 2019-01-01, 2019-06-01.
ambiguities.ref:
order_types = ["Bar", "Massage Bar", "Bath Bomb", "Liquid"]
    by_prod = by_prod.set_index("Type").loc[order_types].reset_index()
    mid = pd.concat([
        all_row,
        by_fruit.set_index("Type").loc[["Non-Fruit", "Fruit"]].reset_index(),
    ], ignore_index=True)
    month_order = [
        "2019-05-01",
        "2019-04-01",
        "2019-03-01",
        "2019-02-01",
        "2019-01-01",
        "2019-06-01",
    ]
    by_month = by_month.set_index("Type").loc[month_order].reset_index()
    out = pd.concat([by_prod, mid, by_month], ignore_index=True)
